synthesis.market_summary: zomato is being compared against 5 competitors: Uber Eats, Grubhub, DoorDash, Postmates, Swiggy. This report was generated with partial live/browser and scraped data because the LLM quota was rate-limited during synthesis.
advantages: Use the live browser findings for Uber Eats to sharpen homepage positioning.
Primary competitor messaging and pricing page were captured directly from the website.
gaps: LLM quota exhaustion reduced the depth of structured competitor profiling in this run.
Some competitors fell back to minimal scraped profiles with limited feature detail.
synthesis.pricing_strategy: Use the captured competitor pricing as directional input, then rerun once LLM quota is available for a stronger recommendation.
recommendations: Re-run the analysis after Groq quota resets to restore full structured competitor synthesis.
Prioritize manual review of Uber Eats homepage and pricing language.
Cache successful competitor profiles so future runs consume fewer tokens.
Reduce prompt size or switch to a lower-cost model for intermediate parsing steps.
Review missing competitor fields and fill the highest-priority gaps first.
